mapper.insert: insert into member_card (member_id, member_no, card_type_id, card_type_name, valid_days, sale_amount, sale_order_no, status, paid_at, effective_at, expired_at, dept_id, create_staff_id, create_staff_name, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_del) values (#{memberId}, #{memberNo}, #{cardTypeId}, #{cardTypeName}, #{validDays}, #{saleAmount}, #{saleOrderNo}, #{status}, #{paidAt}, #{effectiveAt}, #{expiredAt}, #{deptId}, #{createStaffId}, #{createStaffName}, #{remark}, now(), now(), 0)
mapper.select: select * from member_card where id = #{id} and is_del = 0
select * from member_card where sale_order_no = #{saleOrderNo} and is_del = 0 limit 1
select * from member_card where id = #{id} and is_del = 0 for update
select * from member_card where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 1 and is_del = 0 order by effective_at asc, id asc limit 1 for update
select * from member_card where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 0 and is_del = 0 order by paid_at asc, id asc limit 1 for update
select * from member_card where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 0 and is_del = 0 order by paid_at asc, id asc for update
select * from member_card where member_id = #{memberId} and is_del = 0 order by field(status, 1, 0, 2, 3), paid_at asc, id asc
mapper.update: update member_card set status = 1, effective_at = #{effectiveAt}, expired_at = #{expiredAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status = 0 and is_del = 0
update member_card set effective_at = #{effectiveAt}, expired_at = #{expiredAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status = 0 and is_del = 0
update member_card set status = 2, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status = 1 and is_del = 0
update member_card set status = 3, refund_order_no = #{refundOrderNo}, refunded_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status in (0, 1) and is_del = 0
